description: Create the Moderation Worker Service at services/moderation-worker/. This service consumes ModerationJob messages from @quant/queue, routes to text/image/video/audio handlers, applies policy, executes actions (hide/remove/warn/ban), and creates audit log entries via @quant/data-plane.
steps: Step 1: Create services/moderation-worker/package.json - Dependencies: @quant/moderation (workspace:*), @quant/queue (workspace:*), @quant/data-plane (workspace:*), @quant/security (workspace:*), @quant/common (workspace:*), zod, pino, bullmq, ioredis. DevDeps: vitest, typescript, @types/node, ts-node. Add scripts: start, dev, typecheck, test.

Step 3: Add ModerationJobSchema to packages/queue/src/job-definitions.ts - Define ModerationJob Zod schema with fields: contentId, contentType (text|image|video|audio), content (string - text or URL), userId, appId, metadata (Record<string, unknown>). Export ModerationJob type.

Step 4: Create services/moderation-worker/src/main.ts - Service entry point. Consumes ModerationJob from @quant/queue. Routes to appropriate handler based on contentType. Pattern follows services/search-indexer/src/main.ts (Kafka consumer with handler map). Export buildHandlerMap and routeJob for testability.

Step 5: Create services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/text-handler.ts - TextModerationHandler class. Calls TextClassifier from @quant/moderation, applies PolicyEngine, determines action, calls ActionExecutor. Returns ModerationResult.
Step 6: Create services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/image-handler.ts - ImageModerationHandler class. Calls ImageClassifier, checks PerceptualHasher against known-bad hashes, applies policy.

Step 7: Create services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/video-handler.ts - VideoModerationHandler class. Samples frames from video URL (simulated frame extraction), classifies each frame via ImageClassifier, aggregates results.

Step 8: Create services/moderation-worker/src/handlers/audio-handler.ts - AudioModerationHandler class. Transcribes audio to text (via interface/mock), then passes to TextClassifier for classification.

Step 9: Create services/moderation-worker/src/action-executor.ts - ActionExecutor class. Takes severity + action decision, executes: hide content, remove content, warn user, ban user. Every action creates an AuditLog entry using @quant/data-plane AuditLogger interface pattern. Methods: execute(action, context) => ActionResult.

Step 10: Create test files - services/moderation-worker/src/main.test.ts, handlers/text-handler.test.ts, handlers/image-handler.test.ts, handlers/video-handler.test.ts, handlers/audio-handler.test.ts, action-executor.test.ts. Mock all external deps (API clients, queue, audit logger). Verify: text with hate speech gets flagged and action taken, image NSFW gets removed, every action creates audit log entry.
Step 11: Run pnpm install and verify: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run services/moderation-worker
acceptance_criteria: Worker routes text/image/video/audio to correct handlers
Text handler: hate speech input triggers flag/remove action
Image handler: NSFW mock response triggers removal
Video handler: samples frames and classifies
Audio handler: transcribes then classifies text
Every moderation action creates AuditLog entry (Phase 9 integration)
NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run services/moderation-worker passes
verification: Run: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run services/moderation-worker
Run: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run packages/queue
